features.name: always_comb with if-else branching
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with if-else branching that assigns to a register variable

features.name: sequential always with mixed blocking and nonblocking assignments
features.description: Code should include an always @(posedge clk) block containing both blocking and nonblocking assignments to the same register

features.name: parameter in procedural assignment
features.description: Code should include a parameter used in a procedural assignment within an always block
